Geopolitical tensions (US-Iran war escalation) are driving risk-off sentiment and oil price spikes, which typically weigh on BCO_USD (Brent Crude Oil) due to demand concerns amid economic uncertainty.

The recent escalation in US-Iran tensions and subsequent rise in oil prices is likely to further depress the BCO_USD price, given the bearish trend and negative economic impact on oil-importing countries. The Fed's decision to hold rates steady despite spiking oil prices also suggests a cautious stance, which may exacerbate the downward pressure on BCO_USD.
